chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-151 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.03.2022 Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Abbasi, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Yaseen Soomro, Advocate for private respondents. Mr. Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Muhammad Ali Noonari, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. == The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for production of his sister Mst. Najma to be set free after recording her statement as she according to him is confined illegally by the private respondents. The alleged detenue is produced by the private respondents through S.H.O P.S A-Section Nawabshah. It is stated by her that she is not confined illegally by anyone and is passing her life with her husband Ali Bahar happily and wants to join him. Her statement to that effect has also been recorded by S.H.O P.S A-Section Nawabshah, it is taken on record. The statement of the alleged detenue prima facie indicates that she is not under wrongful confinement of anyone to be set free in favour of the petitioner. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE Muhammad Danish
